/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/ModalEditor.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/ModalEditor.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ModalEditor.dir/src/Editor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ModalEditor.dir/src/TerminalManagement.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ModalEditor.dir/src/EditorMode.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ModalEditor.dir/src/CursorController.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ModalEditor.dir/src/EditorView.cpp.o -o ModalEditor
